commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c8159253e8bc24d89330776ec5caff0a30388e51)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a user-config-only `modelOverrides` map for known models, threads it through model resolution and effective request model IDs, and adds resolver/config/run-options tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows the branch writes `reasoning` into `modelConfig`, while the custom/OpenRouter chat-completions adapter copies only `model`, `messages`, and `max_tokens`. I did not run a live custom-gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer approval for the new config/provider-routing API plus contributor runtime proof; automation cannot supply the contributor’s custom-gateway evidence.

target.title: feat(config): add user model overrides for custom gateways
target.body:
## Summary

Closes #273.

Adds a user-config-only `modelOverrides` map so custom OpenAI-compatible gateways (for example LiteLLM-style proxies) can remap a known model's on-wire `apiModel` and model metadata without editing bundled `MODEL_CONFIGS`.

Example:

```json5
{
  "apiBaseUrl": "https://gateway.example/v1",
  "model": "gpt-5.5",
  "modelOverrides": {
    "gpt-5.5": {
      "apiModel": "gpt-5.5-mygateway",
      "reasoning": { "effort": "xhigh" },
      "inputLimit": 1050000,
      "pricing": { "inputPerToken": 0.000005, "outputPerToken": 0.00003 }
    }
  }
}
```

## Design

- User config only: project configs cannot set `modelOverrides`, so an untrusted repo cannot reroute model traffic.
- Known models only: tokenizer and unspecified fields are inherited from the existing `MODEL_CONFIGS` entry.
- Narrow field whitelist: `apiModel`, `reasoning`, `inputLimit`, `pricing`.
- Defensive validation for JSON5 input:
  - `apiModel` must be non-empty (trimmed before use).
  - `reasoning: null` explicitly clears a known model's effort; invalid effort is ignored.
  - `inputLimit` must be a positive safe integer.
  - `pricing` must contain finite, non-negative token prices; `pricing: null` clears pricing.
- Applies overrides last, after known/OpenRouter/generic resolution.
- Ensures the override `apiModel` also feeds `effectiveModelId`, so the request payload's `model` is correct for normal, Gemini, direct/programmatic, and multi-model paths.

## Tests

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run build`
- `env -u ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL -u OPENAI_BASE_URL -u XAI_BASE_URL pnpm test`
  - `141 passed | 18 skipped`
  - `1356 passed | 43 skipped`

I stripped local base-url env vars for the full test run because otherwise provider-routing tests pick up the developer environment's custom endpoints.

## Review notes

This intentionally does not add CLI flags like `--api-model` because those become ambiguous with `--models a,b`. The per-model map keeps multi-model behavior explicit and local to each known model key.
